extDesc.message: User-started report assistant for facebook.com. Runs on the current tab only and stores session status locally.

popupHeroCopy.message: Start a reporting run only after you open the target Facebook page yourself. The extension stores count and session state locally in Chrome.

popupTabHint.message: The extension only runs on facebook.com.

popupMessageBarDefault.message: Open a facebook.com page to enable Start.

popupGuidanceItem1.message: User-started only. Nothing runs until you click Start.

popupGuidanceItem2.message: Current tab only. No persistent access is requested for all sites.

popupGuidanceItem3.message: Local storage only. This build does not send data to a remote server.

jsTabHintReady.message: Ready for a user-started run on the current page.

jsTabHintOpenExact.message: Open the exact facebook.com page you want to process.

jsMsgOpenFacebook.message: Open a page on facebook.com, then reopen the popup.

jsMsgActiveThisTab.message: A reporting run is active on this tab.

jsMsgActiveOtherTab.message: A run is already marked as active in another tab.

jsMsgReadyStart.message: Ready. Review the page, then click Start.

jsMsgPrevRunEnded.message: The previous run ended after the page changed or reloaded.

jsMsgInjecting.message: Injecting the content script into the current tab...

jsMsgStartingRun.message: Starting the reporting run on the current tab...

jsMsgStoppedLocally.message: Stopped locally after the content script became unavailable.

contentWaitPopup.message: Waiting for the popup to close completely...

contentPopupClosed.message: Popup closed. Continuing with the next item.

contentFlowError.message: Flow error. Refreshing the page to auto-resume...

contentRefreshedError.message: Refreshed page to recover from an error. Resuming...

contentNoFreshPosts.message: No fresh posts found to report. Refreshing the page...

contentRefreshedNew.message: No posts found. Refreshed page to load new content.
